title: Array Technologies Posts Increased Revenue and Earnings in Q2 2024
text:
Array Technologies Q2 2024 Financial Results

Revenue:
Q2 2024 revenue totaled US$255.8 million, representing a sequential increase from US$153.4 million in Q1 2024. However, this marks a significant decline compared to the same quarter in 2023, which reported US$507.7 million.

Earnings:
- Adjusted EBITDA: US$55.4 million (up from US$26.2 million in Q1 2024, but down from US$155.5 million in Q2 2023)
- Net income attributable to common shareholders: US$12 million
- Adjusted earnings per share: US$0.20

2024 Full-Year Guidance:
The company forecasts:
- Revenue: US$900 million to US$1,000 million
- Adjusted EBITDA: US$185 million to US$210 million
- Adjusted net income per share: US$0.64 to US$0.74

Key Context:
CEO Kevin Hostetler noted that project delays have influenced the reduced outlook, citing trade laws and tax credits creating uncertainty. The company maintains healthy order book levels exceeding US$2 billion.
